title: Stormhold Keep
blurb: Storm the rain-lashed castle to oust Captain Vexis and the raider warband holed up in its throne sanctum.

storm_gate.scene: Rain hammers the shattered portcullis of Stormhold Keep. A dead royal messenger lies half-buried in the rubble, his satchel spilling a wax-sealed healing draught and a rain-blurred dispatch: the raider warband that seized the keep answers to one Captain Vexis, holed up in the throne sanctum at its heart. The iron-bound doors into the great hall stand ajar ahead — the only way in.

great_hall.scene: A vast hall, its banners torn down and its long table overturned for cover. Two raiders — Dax and Bru — spring up from a looted strongbox, blades in hand; they look more like paid muscle than zealots. Beyond them the hall forks: a spiral stair climbs to the storm-lashed ramparts, while a flight of cellar steps descends into a flooded crypt. Both routes, the messenger's dispatch warned, rejoin at the keep's heart.

high_ramparts.scene: Wind and rain scour the open battlements. Hookjaw, a hulking raider ogre, plants himself before the captain's door with a tree-trunk club and bellows over the storm. There is no cover up here — only the brute between you and the keep's heart. It is the short road, and the hard one.

flooded_crypt.scene: Ankle-deep black water fills the crypt beneath the keep. Two skeletal guardians stand slack and unseeing among the tombs — roused, but not yet aware of you. A submerged passage rises at the far end toward the keep's heart, and a Pearl of Power glimmers in a cracked reliquary on a tomb-lid. The quiet road, if you can keep it quiet.

throne_sanctum.scene: Lightning stutters through a broken dome onto a usurped throne. Captain Vexis, the raider warlord, rises with a cruel grin and a notched longsword as the storm howls through the rafters. Both roads end here, at the heart of the keep. The signet of Stormhold glints on a chain at his belt. There is nowhere left to run — for either of you.
